Frontend Developer

Atlas Digital Pty Ltd

Sydney NSW

Hybrid work model

$35-45.60/hr

Posted 2 days ago

About the role

We are looking for a Frontend Developer to join our team in Sydney NSW on a hybrid schedule. This contract role pays $35-45.60/hr and is ideal for someone who enjoys shipping polished user experiences in React and TypeScript.

Responsibilities include collaborating with product, refining UI components, and participating in code reviews. The position is listed directly by Atlas Digital Pty Ltd on SEEK.
